name: COD Pool Party
description:
After a very successful mission, join Ghost, König, Gaz, Soap, Price, and Horangi for a pool party! Everyone used this as an opportunity to wind down from the mission and show off their more unprofessional, casual selves. 

(Imma be honest, I don’t know shit about COD except the men are hot as shit so sorry if there personalities are off ☠️)
creator: iiknown
